title: ヴィクトリアマイルにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Victoria Mile, Vodka's first senior goal, is
finally here!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's get goin'. It's a mile race, so if I'm not
careful, it'll be over before I know it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to think about anything durin' the
race. But today, I feel like that's actually perfect
for me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I need to find my next goal... and my next me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I always feel out what's really important
based on instinct.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: The answers come to me during races. It's like...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When my thoughts disappear and I'm running with
all my might, I sorta get this tunnel vision focus.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
For the first time in a while, I'm here with a clear
mind. All I need to do is run fast.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This isn't so bad... Actually, I feel like it might be
easier to find answers in times like these.
choice_data_list: All right. Then, let's get searching!
All right. Then, let's get searching!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Right! Like always, I'm gonna give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Victoria, you might be the goddess of victory, but I'm good on the blessings. I'm winnin' this my way!
